programme.desc: A couple from Norwich get married at their hamlet in the Limousin. Meanwhile, in the Dordogne region, two estate agents reveal plans to renovate a stunning chateau. And in Portugal, a couple from Eastbourne try to pick themselves up after a wild fire rips through their village

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps an engaged couple from Shropshire to find a new holiday home in the seaside town of Gran Alacant on Spain's southern Costa Blanca before their wedding

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Joanne ticks off some outstanding jobs on a property she is renovating to sell as a side hustle. Lea juggles running his busy British pub with organising a surprise birthday party for his wife, and Andreas's daughter is in town for the summer holidays

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Jane and Rory dive into a new project and Anna and Maxime tame a wild, overgrown courtyard. Louisa and Rodger face the challenge of finishing a new suite before a wedding party arrives - knowing if they fail, they'll have a very unhappy bride on their hands

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Emotions run high in Almería, as Sharon and Steve Garner take on the task of finding Isle of Man couple Stephen and Andrew a new permanent home under the Spanish sun. Meanwhile, Birmingham childhood sweethearts Kevin and Liz are hoping to relocate to the Costa Blanca after 40 years together and are putting their trust in husband-and-wife team Jo and Andrew Alderton

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Matt Shea sets out on the trail of wanted criminals evading justice in an attempt to reveal the shocking scale of this country's hidden fugitive crisis. His journey leads him from safehouses in London to an underground network in Thailand, as he uncovers a shocking new mentality among criminals, where justice is optional. What does this mean for victims of crime and for confidence in the criminal justice system?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Costumier Scott usually hides behind the drag queen Casta Hex, but tonight he's shedding his alter ego as he sits down with George, who may strut in like a catwalk star, but hasn't dated in five years. Former Olympian Simon and 60-year-old stable manager Louise are both seeking love later in life, while disco queen Priscilla and bhangra-loving accountant Raj both want fun, but can their musical tastes mix? Twenty-three-year-old Jack is feeling nervous about his blind date and hopes he can find some common ground with Rachella

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets another bunch of challenges for the celebrities, as a result of which Joanna Page does something startling with a pineapple, Armando Iannucci does something confusing with a nursery rhyme and Amy Gledhill does something unexpected with balls of ice. As if that wasn't enough, Kumail Nanjiani reveals his missing body part. Greg Davies dishes out the points

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a year's worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Swallows Rest in Weymouth, Dorset, where hosts Jane and Keith Smith are pulling out all the stops to win. However, the colour combinations in the rooms do not go down well with rival B&B owner Ray Chowdhury, and an afternoon of drawing starts some competition between Ray and newlyweds James and Darren Kosa-Jones

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Burley Inn in the New Forest, where newlyweds Darren and James welcome their guests. Donna and David prove to have a critical eye when they discover holes in the sheets, and Jane and Keith have a disagreement over a toilet roll. In the afternoon, the couple reveal their quizmaster skills, before Ray grills them on how they run their B&B over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Hotel Montville in Redditch, Worcestershire for the third day of the competition, where first impressions of Ray Chowdhury's unique style and decor are positive. However, room inspections leave Jane and Keith Smith threatening not to stay, and the guests grill their host about his business background at dinner. Although some light relief is given in the form of ice sculpting, breakfast disappoints James and Darren Kosa-Jones, and Ray must face the harsh reality of his guests' opinions at feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to Donna and David's Silverton B&B in Shrewsbury, where the complimentary earplugs soon have Darren and James worrying about the noise from the road outside. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner announced. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The adults take a trip to Las Vegas, where Jay wheels and deals to get them some better rooms - including their very own British butler, played by Stephen Merchant. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Plans for a relaxed evening at Jay's turn out to be anything but when Claire is mad with her dad over his lack of gratitude for her holding the fort at work and Mitchell is busy scheming after receiving a gift he doesn't like. Meanwhile, Phil and Gloria stop off at her old salon and get scissor-happy when a stylist fails to show up

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders' advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart learns that he was once a child celebrity, but that Homer spent all the money he made, so he separates from his parents and moves into a loft apartment, where his neighbours are punk band Blink-182 and skateboarding hero Tony Hawk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I'm Spelling as Fast as I Can
programme.desc: Homer develops a ravenous appetite for Krustyburger's new spare rib sandwich, while Lisa is offered a scholarship at the college of her choice - but only if she agrees to deliberately lose a spelling contest

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's new girlfriend gives his self-confidence a boost, but Peralta is forced to intervene before his colleague gets too serious, too soon in the relationship. Meanwhile, Diaz and Santiago have trouble taking a costumed crimefighter seriously, and Holt faces a challenge to his leadership

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Valentine's Day arrives, which for the Dunphys means their chance to dress up and romance each other as their once-a-year role-play characters Clive and Juliana - although Claire begins to worry that Phil prefers her like this. Meanwhile, Jay's romantic plans hit a snag in the sassy form of Gloria's sister Sonia, who ends up trying to seduce him, and wires are crossed when Mitch and Cam find themselves in a sticky situation with pal Anders

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are flying home from a weekend away, but Phil is less than happy when Claire takes the only first-class seat available. Mitch and Cam throw a belated baby shower for their friend Sal, and are surprised to find that motherhood seems to have changed her, and Jay shows Manny how to defend himself against a bully in his cooking class. Elizabeth Banks, Nathan Lane and Penn Jillette guest star

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is stuck at an airport and needs to track down Haley, who has gone missing following an argument, so she logs on to her laptop and checks in with the rest of the family in the hope of making amends with her daughter. Julie Bowen stars in a novel episode filmed entirely on Apple devices, with Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Sarah Hyland

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Claire shoot an advert to rival a competitor's catchy new campaign - but creative differences threaten to tear the father and daughter apart. Phil, Luke and Manny join forces to take down a Peeping Tom who has been using a drone to spy on a sunbathing Gloria, Cam worries about Lily's lack of singing skills ahead of a talent show, and Haley has a confession for Andy when he's rushed to hospital with appendicitis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Steph and Billy, their best man George and bridesmaid Becca relive the unforgettable piggy wedding that shocked many back in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackpool compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with practising Buddhist Antonio and former Redcoat Jason, who serve up a sushi starter. A discovery on day two at the home of fireman Daz and his wife Kim raises a few eyebrows, while the final night sees foodies Martin and Kate prepare an authentic Thai menu and a chocolate dessert

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam worry about the growing cost of their wedding, so they agree to each sell a prized possession to earn some extra cash. Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge one another to step outside their comfort zones, involving traditional sausages, pickle and Stella's belly, while the Dunphy kids are in a mischievous mood after finding an old answering machine recording of Claire breaking the news that she's pregnant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mitch and Cam prepare to walk down the aisle, but are faced with a host of hitches before they tie the knot. Pepper is forced to bring the ceremony forward by four hours because of a spreading wildfire, while one of the grooms' tuxedos has been left at the dry cleaners

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Glamorous Hollywood star Sara Sloane visits Springfield and becomes infatuated with Ned Flanders, who finds himself asking Homer for dating advice. Featuring the voices of Helen Fielding and Marisa Tomei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: With changes afoot at Springfield's airport, Bart persuades Krusty to run for Congress so he can redirect the flight path of planes passing over the Simpson home. However, he soon alters his policies once elected

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer manages to become the owner of the power plant and, in a rare display of intelligence and ingenuity, he celebrates his new-found prestige by sacking former boss Mr Burns - who does not take kindly to being ousted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: 'Scuse Me While I Miss the Sky
programme.desc: Lisa resolves to pursue a career in astronomy, but unfortunately her decision coincides with Chief Wiggum's hare-brained new initiative to reduce crime in Springfield - by illuminating the whole town all night. With the guest voice of Eric Idle

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay switches sides after joining Cam's bowling team, while Phil and Claire see a different side to their neighbours. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Bad moods must be catching when Phil and Jay spend the afternoon together. Meanwhile, Gloria teaches Haley how to stand up to her boss. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Alex goes head-to-head with a school rival, Gloria prepares for her US citizenship test, only to be thrown off her game by Javier. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is in a quandary after receiving a job offer from a lucrative hotel chain, but her decision is made easier by Jay's attitude to her potential departure. Manny is recovering after a trip to the dentist, prompting Gloria to take advantage of his groggy state to try to engineer a break-up between him and his girlfriend

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders buys the Simpsons' home when they are unable to pay their mortgage and rents it back to them at an affordable rate, but Homer soon takes advantage of his new landlord's generosity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa has to go undercover as a nun and infiltrate a convent when Maggie goes missing after being left on its doorstep. Meanwhile, Marge is left temporarily blind when she stares at a total eclipse, so Homer has to sort out their rat-infested kitchen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: After ducking out of a bonding session with Grampa, a guilt-ridden Homer vows to make it up to his father by granting him a wish. The old man decides to visit Ireland and drop in on his favourite pub from his army days. Upon arrival, the pair discover the bar is a shadow of its former self, and agree to buy the business and turn its fortunes around

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer proposes to Marge for the second time when he discovers their marriage licence is invalid, but the ceremony does not proceed without a hitch. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta and Julie Kavner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse moves to Capital City with his mother, forcing Bart to look for new friends - but he finds himself bonding more strongly with Lisa. Meanwhile, Homer resorts to begging to raise money for Marge's anniversary gift

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa schemes to get her own back on Bart for destroying the prize tomato she grew for a science project. Meanwhile, Homer is arrested for drink-driving and finds himself having to attend Alcoholics Anonymous meetings

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's the end-of-agency party, and a surprise from the agents tests the strength of the connections that the celebrities and their dates have formed. Professor Green takes the mic for a performance to remember

programme.title: Bad Teacher (2011)
programme.desc: Cynical, hard-drinking teacher Elizabeth Halsey hates her job and the kids in her class, and hopes to escape her daily grind by landing a rich husband. A wealthy substitute seems like a suitable candidate, but she has a rival for his attention in a squeaky-clean colleague. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Jason Segel and Lucy Punch

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's the end-of-agency party, and a surprise from the agents tests the strength of the connections that the celebrities and their dates have formed. Professor Green takes the mic for a performance to remember

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The Mediterranean pop-up parlour gets a visit from holiday tattoo collector Lewis, who was left with an unsightly tattoo on his bottom after a bender in Thailand, and club rep Jamiee, whose bungled boob job gets a lift. Meanwhile, party girl Sophie's unusual animal-inspired tattoo makes a splash with Alice. Jay takes on best mates Sam and Laura's cheeky stickmen, Sketch helps Aaron with a lads' holiday regret, and spontaneous Danny's Magaluf mistake is 'wrecked-tified'

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. As the series climax approaches, Little Alex Horne risks raising notoriously prickly Greg Davies' hackles with a task in celebration of himself. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson join forces with Jason Manford and Roisin Conaty respectively. Sam Simmons helps the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Former participants Amit Kleinberger, Randy DeWitt and Steve Greenbaum want to take another look at the everyday workings of their businesses, but fear they will be recognised. They each send an employee in their place to report on how their firms are functioning

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Stockport serve up an inventive menu, a fresh, healthy series of dishes and a taste of Asia as they compete for the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in Essex, with an eye on the £1,000 prize. The first couple to host are flight attendant Penny and doctors' surgery manager Chris. Their homely menu doesn't quite live up to the standards of bling-loving receptionist Tatia and her husband, metal worker Mick. The youngest duo, Lewis and Krystal, host on day two and manage to impress their older guests. Finally, it's Mick and Tatia's chance to show off their culinary skills with a fancy menu

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 30-year-old Newcastle man hopes to give his 26-year-old art-teacher fiancee the wedding of her dreams. The couple have been inseparable since they met five years ago while working behind a bar, but the groom's love of science fiction is at odds with the bride's sophisticated tastes

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Anna, a 31-year-old support worker from Liverpool hopes to give her fiancee Sian the ceremony of her dreams. However, she struggles to set aside her tomboy tendencies and adapt to the feminine world of wedding planning, and best woman Jade threatens to be more of a hindrance than a help

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Armando Montelongo, the CEO of a Texas property investment company, is worried that the firm's rapid growth means he no longer has any interaction with the staff at the heart of his business. So he goes undercover to work alongside them and find out whether the business is operating as efficiently as possible

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Butler, the founder of one of America's most successful bakeries, dons a disguise to go incognito among her employees, posing as a contestant on a reality show. Gina is heavily involved in the creation of every recipe for the cupcakes sold in her stores and is keen to ensure each franchise is consistent in meeting her perfectionist standards

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. He has all but given up and his constant negativity is rubbing off on the staff. Can Gordon get this establishment back on track before Ken loses everything?

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Crystal and Jon are tired of suburbia and want to change their lifestyle by moving downtown with their two teenage daughters. But before they can start city-living, the brothers must hunt down a dreamy downsize. And the couple learn that it's easier said than done when working with tight margins

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Essex is the setting for couples Charlotte and Neil, Luke and Alice, and Hardeep and Sareena to host a trio of dinner parties. Their efforts include a pantomime-themed menu and an evening of north Indian cuisine. However, a couple's joke at one guest's expense threatens to cost them valuable points

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. It's the grand final, which means one superior competitor will end this episode by clutching Greg Davies' gilded bonce to their proud chest. But before that glorious moment, Sophie Willan will impress on keyboards, Steve Pemberton will be surprised in a field, John Robins will refuse a biscuit, Joanne McNally will struggle with an anagram, and Nick Mohammed will make a magical prediction. And, of course, Little Alex Horne will diligently record every last moment for posterity

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent takes her usual place in Dictionary Corner with David O'Doherty, while mathematics whizz Rachel Riley is on hand to provide the letters and numbers

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Robert Popper's low-key comedy. Jonny is in a foul mood when he discovers a secret betrayal while reading Adam's childhood diary - and vows to get revenge. Mum struggles to keep the peace as the brothers' feud rages through the house, while Dad's inability to control his sneezing causes further chaos. Starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Grandma introduces the family to her new boyfriend, but the old curmudgeon quickly upsets everyone with his rude behaviour. Dad cannot stand him and hides in his shed, but nobody is prepared for what happens when the guest suddenly loses his temper. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark grows concerned that Jeff and Sophie's work trip to Aberdeen could turn into something intimate, and attempts to stop them hooking up together. Meanwhile, Jeremy gets a new girlfriend - but is seized by fits of jealousy whenever she looks at another man. Starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark makes a new friend at the office who seems likely to broaden his horizons. Meanwhile, Jeremy meets an acquaintance from school who wants him to star in his art-house movie. David Mitchell, Robert Webb and Olivia Colman star

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The gang takes on Stuart, whose drunken antics led to a very cheeky tattoo, as well as Catherine, a Cher impersonator whose dedication to the job ended with a mishap on her hip, not to mention unlucky-in-love Tom, whose terrible 'tittywhacker' tattoo has left him single and unable to mingle. Meanwhile, Sketch is helping to Des-troy Alex's lame boxing tatts, Alice is giving Jade a new inking to celebrate her impressive weight loss, and Jay is monkeying around with an old friend

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chicago-based hardware retailer True Value's CEO and president John Hartmann poses as a handyman taking part in a reality show to go incognito among his own workforce to see how he can extend the company's lifespan and improve the experiences of both customers and employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bill Peduto, 60th Mayor of Pittsburgh, who comes from a proud family of Pennsylvania steel workers, goes incognito among his own workforce posing as a reality show contestant from Kentucky. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in Dartford and Beckenham, Kent. Jamie and his fiancée Carol kick off the competition with a party themed evening, inspired by their passion for all things 'crazy'. Unfortunately for them, a dessert proves almost inedible. Day two sees champagne lovers Paul and Justin hosting an international menu inspired by their extensive travels. Finally it's cockney couple Richard and Julie's chance to impress with a technical dessert and flavours designed to appeal to a mature palette

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the north east of England compete - loved-up musicians Nick and Kelly, laidback Michael and Becky, and Matthew and Katie with their refined French cuisine

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rugby player Nick Royle from Widnes in Cheshire plans his wedding to Victoria Bilio. The couple had a difficult start when the bride was diagnosed with Guillain-Barre syndrome - an auto-immune disorder - just two months into their relationship, but the groom stood by his fiancee and now hopes to give her the ceremony of her dreams

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Darryl from Co Wicklow sets out to organise the perfect wedding for his childhood sweetheart Clodagh, and plans an outdoor reception in a home-made tipi decked with fairy lights

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Courtland Gray, the COO of audio equipment manufacturer Peavey Electronics, is poised to take over the Mississippi-based company when his stepfather, founder and CEO Hartley Peavey, is ready to hand over the reins. As he prepares to take full responsibility for the firm, Courtland dons a disguise to go incognito among the staff and find out how the frontline employees really feel

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Todd Pedersen, CEO and founder of Vivint, a leading solar and home security business, based in Utah, goes undercover among his own workforce posing as a contestant on a reality show. He's proud to head an organisation that provides a fun and relaxed work environment, but now that the company is offering smart home technology, it's in competition with much larger organisations, and Todd wants to make sure it's fully prepared to take them on

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Supercar fanatic Eddie Kaen has spent millions on the design of the Keating in San Diego, California, but neglected to invest in things the guests really need. Gordon Ramsay's visit uncovers empty rooms, a failing restaurant and staff at the end of their tether - leading to a shocking crisis that nobody saw coming

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits Meson de Mesilla, a Tuscan-style hotel in Las Cruces, New Mexico. Owner and former child-star Cali Szczawinski purchased the hotel so she could perform Cher songs every night to a captive audience, but Gordon investigates whether she may be falling flat when it comes to the needs of her guests because she's too busy trying to hit the high notes on stage

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey to transform Max's Bar & Grill. Even though it's been serving up famous hotdogs for almost 100 years, it's on the verge of crumbling, with over $1million of debt. The situation isn't helped by a power struggle between the divorced owners, who still work together

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Anglia, three couples compete to host the best dinner party. Chris and Debbie pull out all the stops with an evening of showbiz glitz and glamour, complete with Las Vegas-style dancing girls. Jake and Desiree's night is more chilled out, as they lay on some Caribbean flavours. Bickering duo Daisy and Will try to resolve their differences to pip their rivals to the prize

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones are the five phenoms who have willingly submitted to the toughest physical and mental examination on television, as Taskmaster returns for an 18th series. But will their attempts to defuse a large robot, push a golden envelope or simply count some chairs impress the Taskmaster, Greg Davies? In the first episode, Greg and his faultlessly loyal assistant Alex Horne welcome five fairly fresh bodies for a crack at TV's greatest prize: Greg's disembodied head, painted gold and stuck to a plinth. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones attempt to impress the Taskmaster by searching for a seal, hurling yoga balls in a theme park, and force-feeding Alex a bowlful of bubblegum

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Rob Beckett to go up against Jon Richardson and Cariad Lloyd in the comedy words-and-numbers quiz. Jamie Laing joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Jonny claims to have dislocated his shoulder to get out of helping clean out the loft. Adam discovers he's lying and threatens to tell their mum - until his brother responds by promising to tell her about his blind date with Hayley Posner. Meanwhile, the boys' parents are not on speaking terms after an argument, with Dad revealing only that it is about something 'sexual'

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Mum has put Dad on a diet for two weeks, but he makes the boys smuggle in food for him - which he keeps hidden in the downstairs toilet. Later, returning from a spin in Jonny's new - and very uncool - company car, the family members find something awful has happened to their house. Comedy, starring Paul Ritter and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy joins a band, but insists he is not going to be their roadie. Mark tries to forget Sophie by stalking shop assistant April - which results in him pretending to be signed up to the same history course as her. Offbeat comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Sophie tells Mark she and Jeff are moving in together, and the blow is compounded when she reveals she has been asked her to spend less time with him. Meanwhile, Jeremy becomes concerned about how his glum friend is coping with depression. Starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the irreverent panel show, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by Richard Hammond, Carol Vorderman, Paul Foot and Matt Forde to see who best understands what is going on in Britain

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Kev, his ex-paratrooper best man Sam, bride Trish and her best friend Charlene join together to relive one of the most turbulent weddings in the show's history

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire's plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Blackpool compete to win the £1,000 prize, including former dancer Rowan and businessman John, who start the proceedings. Also vying to win are Sally and Joanne who hope to impress their guests with an unusual menu that features a Tandoori Tower and a belly-busting breakfast, before competitive duo Holly and Ollie pull out all the stops in an attempt to secure the cash

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The adults take a trip to Las Vegas, where Jay wheels and deals to get them some better rooms - including their very own British butler, played by Stephen Merchant. Phil spends most of his time with his magician heroes - neglecting Claire in the process - and Mitch runs into an ex-boyfriend he dumped by e-mail, although it all seems fine when he invites Mitch and Cam to his bachelor party

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Plans for a relaxed evening at Jay's turn out to be anything but when Claire is mad with her dad over his lack of gratitude for her holding the fort at work and Mitchell is busy scheming after receiving a gift he doesn't like. Meanwhile, Phil and Gloria stop off at her old salon and get scissor-happy when a stylist fails to show up

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders' advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart learns that he was once a child celebrity, but that Homer spent all the money he made, so he separates from his parents and moves into a loft apartment, where his neighbours are punk band Blink-182 and skateboarding hero Tony Hawk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I'm Spelling as Fast as I Can
programme.desc: Homer develops a ravenous appetite for Krustyburger's new spare rib sandwich, while Lisa is offered a scholarship at the college of her choice - but only if she agrees to deliberately lose a spelling contest

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's new girlfriend gives his self-confidence a boost, but Peralta is forced to intervene before his colleague gets too serious, too soon in the relationship. Meanwhile, Diaz and Santiago have trouble taking a costumed crimefighter seriously, and Holt faces a challenge to his leadership

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Valentine's Day arrives, which for the Dunphys means their chance to dress up and romance each other as their once-a-year role-play characters Clive and Juliana - although Claire begins to worry that Phil prefers her like this. Meanwhile, Jay's romantic plans hit a snag in the sassy form of Gloria's sister Sonia, who ends up trying to seduce him, and wires are crossed when Mitch and Cam find themselves in a sticky situation with pal Anders

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are flying home from a weekend away, but Phil is less than happy when Claire takes the only first-class seat available. Mitch and Cam throw a belated baby shower for their friend Sal, and are surprised to find that motherhood seems to have changed her, and Jay shows Manny how to defend himself against a bully in his cooking class. Elizabeth Banks, Nathan Lane and Penn Jillette guest star

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is stuck at an airport and needs to track down Haley, who has gone missing following an argument, so she logs on to her laptop and checks in with the rest of the family in the hope of making amends with her daughter. Julie Bowen stars in a novel episode filmed entirely on Apple devices, with Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Sarah Hyland

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Claire shoot an advert to rival a competitor's catchy new campaign - but creative differences threaten to tear the father and daughter apart. Phil, Luke and Manny join forces to take down a Peeping Tom who has been using a drone to spy on a sunbathing Gloria, Cam worries about Lily's lack of singing skills ahead of a talent show, and Haley has a confession for Andy when he's rushed to hospital with appendicitis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. Paranoia stalks Homer after he forgets to pay the family's insurance bill and leaves him trying to prevent a host of imaginary catastrophes

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: At the Springfield library, Marge stimulates the children's interest in history by relating extraordinary tales featuring the wives of Henry VIII, the Lewis and Clark expedition and the early life of Austrian composer Mozart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart grows frustrated by Homer's lack of interest in him and sets out to search for a new father figure. Lisa tries to break her addiction to an expensive teenage chat-line, but finds it harder than expected

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: David questions whether Anthony has doubts, Gabby works out if she had a future with Joel, PK attempts to show a different side to his character

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the state funeral of Elizabeth II, and also offer insightful and passionate takes on The Masked Dancer, Frozen Planet II, Bad Sisters, The Grand Tour: A Scandi Flick, Secret Crush and BBC News. From September 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recipe developer Mimi is looking for a fun-loving fellow creative and her date with rugby referee and sausage roll-maker Joel starts well when he turns up with a gift for her. Theatre producer Sue, meets American psychologist Beri, who is looking for an English rose, while rugby player Dan seems to tick all of Irish model Laura's boxes, but when she finds out what he does for a living, things could take a turn for the worse

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: David questions whether Anthony has doubts, Gabby works out if she had a future with Joel, PK attempts to show a different side to his character

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughter's employee discount too frequently. Meanwhile, during a trip to the horse racing track, Pops bends the truth to convince Barry that his bad luck has changed for the better. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Steph and Billy, their best man George and bridesmaid Becca relive the unforgettable piggy wedding that shocked many back in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackpool compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with practising Buddhist Antonio and former Redcoat Jason, who serve up a sushi starter. A discovery on day two at the home of fireman Daz and his wife Kim raises a few eyebrows, while the final night sees foodies Martin and Kate prepare an authentic Thai menu and a chocolate dessert

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam worry about the growing cost of their wedding, so they agree to each sell a prized possession to earn some extra cash. Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge one another to step outside their comfort zones, involving traditional sausages, pickle and Stella's belly, while the Dunphy kids are in a mischievous mood after finding an old answering machine recording of Claire breaking the news that she's pregnant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mitch and Cam prepare to walk down the aisle, but are faced with a host of hitches before they tie the knot. Pepper is forced to bring the ceremony forward by four hours because of a spreading wildfire, while one of the grooms' tuxedos has been left at the dry cleaners

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Glamorous Hollywood star Sara Sloane visits Springfield and becomes infatuated with Ned Flanders, who finds himself asking Homer for dating advice. Featuring the voices of Helen Fielding and Marisa Tomei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: With changes afoot at Springfield's airport, Bart persuades Krusty to run for Congress so he can redirect the flight path of planes passing over the Simpson home. However, he soon alters his policies once elected

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer manages to become the owner of the power plant and, in a rare display of intelligence and ingenuity, he celebrates his new-found prestige by sacking former boss Mr Burns - who does not take kindly to being ousted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: 'Scuse Me While I Miss the Sky
programme.desc: Lisa resolves to pursue a career in astronomy, but unfortunately her decision coincides with Chief Wiggum's hare-brained new initiative to reduce crime in Springfield - by illuminating the whole town all night. With the guest voice of Eric Idle

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay switches sides after joining Cam's bowling team, while Phil and Claire see a different side to their neighbours. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Bad moods must be catching when Phil and Jay spend the afternoon together. Meanwhile, Gloria teaches Haley how to stand up to her boss. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Alex goes head-to-head with a school rival, Gloria prepares for her US citizenship test, only to be thrown off her game by Javier. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is in a quandary after receiving a job offer from a lucrative hotel chain, but her decision is made easier by Jay's attitude to her potential departure. Manny is recovering after a trip to the dentist, prompting Gloria to take advantage of his groggy state to try to engineer a break-up between him and his girlfriend

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders buys the Simpsons' home when they are unable to pay their mortgage and rents it back to them at an affordable rate, but Homer soon takes advantage of his new landlord's generosity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa has to go undercover as a nun and infiltrate a convent when Maggie goes missing after being left on its doorstep. Meanwhile, Marge is left temporarily blind when she stares at a total eclipse, so Homer has to sort out their rat-infested kitchen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: After ducking out of a bonding session with Grampa, a guilt-ridden Homer vows to make it up to his father by granting him a wish. The old man decides to visit Ireland and drop in on his favourite pub from his army days. Upon arrival, the pair discover the bar is a shadow of its former self, and agree to buy the business and turn its fortunes around

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer proposes to Marge for the second time when he discovers their marriage licence is invalid, but the ceremony does not proceed without a hitch. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta and Julie Kavner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse moves to Capital City with his mother, forcing Bart to look for new friends - but he finds himself bonding more strongly with Lisa. Meanwhile, Homer resorts to begging to raise money for Marge's anniversary gift

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa schemes to get her own back on Bart for destroying the prize tomato she grew for a science project. Meanwhile, Homer is arrested for drink-driving and finds himself having to attend Alcoholics Anonymous meetings

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's the end-of-agency party, and a surprise from the agents tests the strength of the connections that the celebrities and their dates have formed. Professor Green takes the mic for a performance to remember

programme.title: Bad Teacher (2011)
programme.desc: Cynical, hard-drinking teacher Elizabeth Halsey hates her job and the kids in her class, and hopes to escape her daily grind by landing a rich husband. A wealthy substitute seems like a suitable candidate, but she has a rival for his attention in a squeaky-clean colleague. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Jason Segel and Lucy Punch

programme.title: Friends with Benefits (2011)
programme.desc: An art director joins the staff of a magazine, and is soon sleeping with the recruiter who hired him. Both are determined to avoid a relationship and resolve to keep their feelings out of the arrangement - which proves harder than expected. Romantic comedy, starring Justin Timberlake, Mila Kunis, Patricia Clarkson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Jade, 24, sits down for a meal with Jak, 29, a yoga lover in touch with his spiritual side and who shares her love of exercise and tattoos, while fashion stylist Christine, 70, and entrepreneur Peter, 71, share stories of the Swinging Sixties. Health club manager Donna, 51, is a born romantic with old fashioned values at heart and her date is 53-year-old stetson-wearing Simon from Dallas, Texas, who's happy to stand out from the crowd and is looking for a strong woman to stand by his side

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's the end-of-agency party, and a surprise from the agents tests the strength of the connections that the celebrities and their dates have formed. Professor Green takes the mic for a performance to remember

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is pitted against a rival mother when she tries to micro-manage Barry and Erica's search for college places, while Erica tells Pops that she has tried to enhance her prospects by lying about her extracurricular activities. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Bride Lauren and music-mad Perry are under the spotlight as they regroup with best man Michael and bridesmaid Leigh to relive their gig-themed wedding at The Forum, Kentish Town

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebrities get their final consultations, David and Coleen head to the farm with their dates, while Lucinda decides who meets her emotional and physical desires

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

Meanwhile, Barry and Erica battle for control of the family's telephone line and beg their parents to get a second one installed. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly reignites a long-standing feud after she invites Murray's unreliable brother to visit at Thanksgiving. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: David questions whether Anthony has doubts, Gabby works out if she had a future with Joel, PK attempts to show a different side to his character

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the state funeral of Elizabeth II, and also offer insightful and passionate takes on The Masked Dancer, Frozen Planet II, Bad Sisters, The Grand Tour: A Scandi Flick, Secret Crush and BBC News. From September 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recipe developer Mimi is looking for a fun-loving fellow creative and her date with rugby referee and sausage roll-maker Joel starts well when he turns up with a gift for her. Theatre producer Sue, meets American psychologist Beri, who is looking for an English rose, while rugby player Dan seems to tick all of Irish model Laura's boxes, but when she finds out what he does for a living, things could take a turn for the worse

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: David questions whether Anthony has doubts, Gabby works out if she had a future with Joel, PK attempts to show a different side to his character

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughter's employee discount too frequently. Meanwhile, during a trip to the horse racing track, Pops bends the truth to convince Barry that his bad luck has changed for the better. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Steph and Billy, their best man George and bridesmaid Becca relive the unforgettable piggy wedding that shocked many back in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Blackpool compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with practising Buddhist Antonio and former Redcoat Jason, who serve up a sushi starter. A discovery on day two at the home of fireman Daz and his wife Kim raises a few eyebrows, while the final night sees foodies Martin and Kate prepare an authentic Thai menu and a chocolate dessert

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam worry about the growing cost of their wedding, so they agree to each sell a prized possession to earn some extra cash. Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge one another to step outside their comfort zones, involving traditional sausages, pickle and Stella's belly, while the Dunphy kids are in a mischievous mood after finding an old answering machine recording of Claire breaking the news that she's pregnant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mitch and Cam prepare to walk down the aisle, but are faced with a host of hitches before they tie the knot. Pepper is forced to bring the ceremony forward by four hours because of a spreading wildfire, while one of the grooms' tuxedos has been left at the dry cleaners

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Glamorous Hollywood star Sara Sloane visits Springfield and becomes infatuated with Ned Flanders, who finds himself asking Homer for dating advice. Featuring the voices of Helen Fielding and Marisa Tomei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: With changes afoot at Springfield's airport, Bart persuades Krusty to run for Congress so he can redirect the flight path of planes passing over the Simpson home. However, he soon alters his policies once elected

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer manages to become the owner of the power plant and, in a rare display of intelligence and ingenuity, he celebrates his new-found prestige by sacking former boss Mr Burns - who does not take kindly to being ousted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: 'Scuse Me While I Miss the Sky
programme.desc: Lisa resolves to pursue a career in astronomy, but unfortunately her decision coincides with Chief Wiggum's hare-brained new initiative to reduce crime in Springfield - by illuminating the whole town all night. With the guest voice of Eric Idle

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay switches sides after joining Cam's bowling team, while Phil and Claire see a different side to their neighbours. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Bad moods must be catching when Phil and Jay spend the afternoon together. Meanwhile, Gloria teaches Haley how to stand up to her boss. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Alex goes head-to-head with a school rival, Gloria prepares for her US citizenship test, only to be thrown off her game by Javier. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is in a quandary after receiving a job offer from a lucrative hotel chain, but her decision is made easier by Jay's attitude to her potential departure. Manny is recovering after a trip to the dentist, prompting Gloria to take advantage of his groggy state to try to engineer a break-up between him and his girlfriend

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders buys the Simpsons' home when they are unable to pay their mortgage and rents it back to them at an affordable rate, but Homer soon takes advantage of his new landlord's generosity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa has to go undercover as a nun and infiltrate a convent when Maggie goes missing after being left on its doorstep. Meanwhile, Marge is left temporarily blind when she stares at a total eclipse, so Homer has to sort out their rat-infested kitchen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: After ducking out of a bonding session with Grampa, a guilt-ridden Homer vows to make it up to his father by granting him a wish. The old man decides to visit Ireland and drop in on his favourite pub from his army days. Upon arrival, the pair discover the bar is a shadow of its former self, and agree to buy the business and turn its fortunes around

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer proposes to Marge for the second time when he discovers their marriage licence is invalid, but the ceremony does not proceed without a hitch. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta and Julie Kavner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Milhouse moves to Capital City with his mother, forcing Bart to look for new friends - but he finds himself bonding more strongly with Lisa. Meanwhile, Homer resorts to begging to raise money for Marge's anniversary gift

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa schemes to get her own back on Bart for destroying the prize tomato she grew for a science project. Meanwhile, Homer is arrested for drink-driving and finds himself having to attend Alcoholics Anonymous meetings

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's the end-of-agency party, and a surprise from the agents tests the strength of the connections that the celebrities and their dates have formed. Professor Green takes the mic for a performance to remember

programme.title: Bad Teacher (2011)
programme.desc: Cynical, hard-drinking teacher Elizabeth Halsey hates her job and the kids in her class, and hopes to escape her daily grind by landing a rich husband. A wealthy substitute seems like a suitable candidate, but she has a rival for his attention in a squeaky-clean colleague. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Jason Segel and Lucy Punch

programme.title: Friends with Benefits (2011)
programme.desc: An art director joins the staff of a magazine, and is soon sleeping with the recruiter who hired him. Both are determined to avoid a relationship and resolve to keep their feelings out of the arrangement - which proves harder than expected. Romantic comedy, starring Justin Timberlake, Mila Kunis, Patricia Clarkson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Jade, 24, sits down for a meal with Jak, 29, a yoga lover in touch with his spiritual side and who shares her love of exercise and tattoos, while fashion stylist Christine, 70, and entrepreneur Peter, 71, share stories of the Swinging Sixties. Health club manager Donna, 51, is a born romantic with old fashioned values at heart and her date is 53-year-old stetson-wearing Simon from Dallas, Texas, who's happy to stand out from the crowd and is looking for a strong woman to stand by his side

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is pitted against a rival mother when she tries to micro-manage Barry and Erica's search for college places, while Erica tells Pops that she has tried to enhance her prospects by lying about her extracurricular activities. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present this year's semi-final, the last four bakers facing three patisserie challenges to decide who will be going through to next week's final. programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the grand final. programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Island Feast

programme.title: Forever Summer with Nigella
programme.desc: Summer recipes, including sticky spare ribs containing fiery red chillies, Indonesian chicken, and ice-cream with a red-hot spicy syrup

programme.title: Forever Summer with Nigella
programme.desc: Food writer Nigella Lawson prepares more summer recipes, taking her inspiration from around the world. She looks to the Middle East for za'atar chicken with fatoush salad, Japan for soba noodles with sesame seeds and a ruby-pink pepper-seared tuna and finishing in Australia with a chewy chocolate and raspberry pavlova

programme.title: Down to Earth
programme.desc: Eddie is horrified to discover that many of his cows have TB and will have to be culled. Meanwhile, there are further romantic entanglements for Nick and Kerry, as she becomes attracted to the new schoolteacher and he turns on the charm with a female police officer who comes to arrest him for serving alcohol to under-age drinkers

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Wealthy widow Alice Costigan invites Robert to stay at her country house for a spot of pheasant shooting, filling him with high hopes of romance. Victorian medical drama, starring Jemma Redgrave, David Calder, Maureen Beattie and Andrew Connolly

programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper invent a colleague in order to donate his salary to an orphanage - but are forced to announce his demise as the scam begins to surface. Korean War comedy, guest starring James B Sikking, with Alan Alda and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)
programme.desc: An Irishman in 19th-century New York is taken under the wing of the ruthless gang leader who killed his father 15 years before, and rises up the ranks of power - all the while plotting his revenge. Meanwhile, the tension caused by the enforced drafting of the population into the army to fight in the Civil War explodes into bloodshed and riots. Martin Scorsese's epic historical drama, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Daniel Day-Lewis, Cameron Diaz and Liam Neeson
