programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Spock's ailing father Ambassador Sarek holds peace talks for a group of feuding alien diplomats while suffering from heart problems, and it soon emerges his son may be the only person who can cure him. Starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve persuades stewardess Julia Flood to lead him to the hideout of revolutionaries who have kidnapped the wife of a US ambassador

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy is shot by an armed robber and lapses into a coma - so Hooker puts his career on the line to ensure the culprit doesn't escape justice. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The Rangers hunt for a serial killer who is murdering federal agents and the investigation reaches its climax when Walker must rescue Alex from the clutches of the criminal

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: Retired soldier Benjamin Martin, who turned his back on the military to become a farmer in South Carolina, takes up arms once more to avenge the unprovoked murder of his son at the hands of the British during the American War of Independence. As he seeks vengeance, he finds himself up against a sadistic officer wreaking havoc in the surrounding area. Roland Emmerich's action adventure, starring Mel Gibson, Jason Isaacs, Heath Ledger and Joely Richardson.

programme.title: Memorial Day (2011)
programme.desc: A Second World War veteran offers to tell his grandson the stories behind his service in the conflict. Years later, the child has grown up to also become a soldier, and finds the old man's tales help him to cope with the challenges he faces serving in Iraq. Drama, starring Jonathan Bennett and James Cromwell, with his real-life son John playing his character as a younger man

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The Rangers hunt for a serial killer who is murdering federal agents and the investigation reaches its climax when Walker must rescue Alex from the clutches of the criminal

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy is shot by an armed robber and lapses into a coma - so Hooker puts his career on the line to ensure the culprit doesn't escape justice. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve persuades stewardess Julia Flood to lead him to the hideout of revolutionaries who have kidnapped the wife of a US ambassador

programme.title: Zodiac: Signs of the Apocalypse (2014)
programme.desc: An archaeologist makes the discovery of a lifetime, only for an artefact from the dig to fall into the wrong hands. As natural disasters begin to sweep the globe, he realises the only way to avert the end of the world is to recover the object and return it to its rightful place. Sci-fi disaster movie, starring Christopher Lloyd and Joel Gretsch

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Gorgon (1964)
programme.desc: A spate of strange deaths occurs in a small German town, with the bodies being turned to stone, and the proprietor of a nearby lunatic asylum soon finds himself under suspicion. However, a folklore expert realises a local woman has been possessed by the legendary snake-headed monster of Greek mythology, and has developed the ability to petrify her victims with a deadly gaze. Hammer horror, starring Peter Cushing, Christopher Lee, Barbara Shelley, Richard Pasco and Patrick Troughton

programme.title: Jules Verne's Rocket to the Moon (1967)
programme.desc: Legendary American showman Phineas T Barnum designs a space rocket, which he hopes will take him to the moon, but his scheme is threatened when two crooks get wind of his plan and decide to sabotage the craft. Sci-fi comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Lionel Jeffries, Burl Ives, Gert Frobe, Dennis Price and Hermione Gingold

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The unexpected presence of Klingon warriors on a mineral-rich world jeopardises delicate negotiations for a treaty with the Federation. Kirk and his crew end up trying to prevent a war and drive their deadliest foes from the planet. Guest starring Julie Newmar

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: The crime-fighting superhero is framed for murder by a killer he once helped put behind bars

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.sub-title: The Two Faces of Betsy Morgan
programme.desc: The city is terrorised by a relentless serial killer known as the Strangler, who targets teenage runaways working as vice girls. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker is tasked with babysitting duties when Alex finds an abandoned baby. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: The Ice Road (2021)
programme.desc: After a remote diamond mine collapses in far northern Canada, a 'big-rig' ice road driver must lead an impossible rescue mission over a frozen lake to save the trapped miners. Action thriller starring Liam Neeson, Marcus Thomas and Laurence Fishburne.

programme.title: Daylight (1996)
programme.desc: A devastating explosion in the New Jersey Tunnel causes a horrific pile-up, trapping a group of motorists underground. A former emergency worker witnesses the blast and heads in to guide the handful of survivors to safety before the waters of the Hudson river above them break through and flood the tunnel. Disaster movie, starring Sylvester Stallone, Amy Brenneman, Viggo Mortensen, Dan Hedaya and Claire Bloom.

programme.title: Armed Response (2017)
programme.desc: A military unit attempting to find out what killed their predecessors find themselves trapped in a compound as strange events begin to take place. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Anne Heche and Dave Annable

programme.title: Paydirt (2020)
programme.desc: A man recently released from prison teams up with his old crew to find a buried bag of cash stolen a decade ago, while being tracked by a retired Sheriff. Crime thriller, starring Val Kilmer

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A look at the specialist team dedicated to caring for people when they suffer the potentially devastating consequences of a stroke, including 77-year-old Alex. Husband Paul sits nervously at her bedside as they wait to see if the drug she has been given will bring back her speech and movement. Meanwhile, doctors examine 66-year-old Steven, who has been admitted with severe stomach cramps

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Listed Britain
programme.desc: Kevin looks at six listed places where saving heritage meant a great deal of hard work from ordinary people campaigning, rebuilding, restoring and refusing to give up. The programme features a pioneering Georgian villa outside Edinburgh, Newport Transporter Bridge, a medieval timber hall, and a church saved from the Reformation

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Xintong is rushed to A&E after being flung from a go-kart at speed. Doctors are concerned that there may be damage to the 28 year old's spine and send her for urgent CT scans. Cameras also follow Gary, 58, who has come to St George's after trapping his finger between two shopping trolleys, causing it to swell enormously

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition features stories of human compassion and kindness in the most challenging circumstances. Allen, 82, has injured his chest after a dizzy spell caused him to fall down 13 steps. As son Graham waits nervously for doctors to assess Allen's injuries, Graham describes his dad's strength and resilience in carrying the family through dark times, and how precious the bond between father and son can be

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Sitting in the Yorkshire Dales National Park, the campers find themselves at The Dalesbridge where bad weather and a feathery fiasco cause tempers to fray. It remains to be seen whether the stunning scenery and live music will win over the campers as they reveal this week's perfect pitch

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Whitby and Shipley in North and West Yorkshire respectively. Henry builds a steampunk lamp from a copper electric central heating pipe, and Simon brings a dated Welsh dresser right up to the present

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a military vehicle enthusiast, where Henry mirror polishes a decommissioned missile and Simon repurposes a tank turret

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Ship Inn in Dymchurch, Kent, where James Tindall and Jessica Walton hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Jacobs Plough in Bicester, Oxfordshire, run by manager Duncan Froomes and bar supervisor Ryan Hunt who like to mix banter with business

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid, while also settling some scores

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The culinary contest arrives in Hull as five more diners hope to claim the grand prize of £1,000. The first to host a party this week is 29-year-old welfare team leader Jennie, who decides to honour her home city's fishing history with an under-the-sea themed dinner. However, her guests prove to be a lively bunch, twerking their way through dinner, and throwing in a few seal impressions along the way

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wrestling promoter and novice cook James hosts the second night in Hull, and he hopes to wow his guests with a Mexican-themed party complete with a wrestling match as the evening's entertainment. However, his costume requirements, and his spicy food, may be too much for some of the attendees

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wedding stationery entrepreneur Katrena hosts the third dinner party in Hull, and hopes to impress her guests with a cruise-ship-themed night featuring a pink strawberry soup starter, a sparkling lemon iceberg dessert and towel-folding entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mum-of-three Natalie hopes that her choice of good quality produce can help her to impress her guests on the fourth night of the competition in Hull, East Yorkshire. However, the evening does not get off to the best start when community manager George wrongly guesses that she is the grandmother of her two-year-old daughter, and entrepreneur Katrena is insulted by one of the host's questions

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final dinner party in Hull and the turn of community manager George to entertain the guests. Having spent the week heavily criticising everyone else's cooking, the host faces great scrutiny with his menu of simple yet tasty favourites. It remains to be seen whether his egg drop soup and flambeed crepes Suzettes live up to expectations, before the winner of the cash prize is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former art dealers Robin and Brenda Spence host first, at Causilgey Manor in Truro, Cornwall. Leoni and Tish from The Chocolate Box are stumped by the decor, and Julie and Jason from The Buckle Seaford react unfavourably to the bathroom with a glass roof. The B&Bers bond at an owl sanctuary, but cracks begin to appear at dinner when Martin and Tracey of Elmfield B&B come clean with their thoughts on the wall hangings. In the morning, Robin and Brenda show that breakfast isn't all about fry-ups, but Jason and Julie's loo-with-a-view leaves the hosts with egg on their faces

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Elmfield B&B in Devon, where retired politician Martin Perry and housekeeper Tracey Barrett pride themselves on keeping things traditional

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Chocolate Box in Bournemouth, where the hosts playful approach leaves their guests questioning their business credentials

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Buckle Seaford B&B in East Sussex, where an afternoon of football confirms the women's suspicions about hosts Julie and Jason Martin's competitive streak

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time, and Causilgey Manor owners Robin and Brenda want to get to grips with Julie and Jason's gripes over privacy

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help house-hunters find their dream properties in the Peak District, guiding them through the complex world of viewings and agents. Kirstie is with single mother Anne, who sold her home in Sheffield to move to the countryside with her teenage son. However, a short-term stay with her parents has turned into eight months, so Kirstie has her work cut out to find Anne a suitable property fast. Phil is with Andrea and James, who are still searching for their ideal place after two years

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Britain's toughest music quiz concludes, as Ken Bruce puts the finalists to the ultimate pop trivia test in the grand final. Who'll reign supreme and be crowned PopMaster TV Champion?

programme.title: Great British Train Journeys from Above
programme.desc: Hugh Bonneville narrates an aerial guide to the North Yorkshire Moors Railway, from the coast at Whitby, across the Yorkshire Moors, to the market town of Pickering. Seen from above, the rail route reveals how George Stephenson's steam revolution changed people, land, industry and trade for ever

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Brooke is rushed to St George's after suffering an asthma attack so severe that the paramedic team had to put her in an induced coma at the scene. Doctors are concerned that she may have dangerous amounts of fluid on her lungs and decide to take urgent chest X-rays. Howard, who's 76, arrives with burns to his face, hands and airways after trying to put out an explosion in his garden shed. As his worried wife waits for news in the relatives' room, doctors attempt to stabilise his condition and investigate the extent of his injuries

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Greg, 47, is airlifted to St George's with critical injuries to his arm and leg after being knocked off his motorbike on the way into work. As his wife Lucie rushes to his bedside, she's shocked by what she finds. Cameras also follow, Cara, 11, who has fallen from the top of a human pyramid doing gymnastics and has a broken arm that doctors must try to realign

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A motorcyclist collides with a deer. Luckily for the patient, an orthopaedic surgeon stops to help. A woman driving to work is forced to pull over and call 999 after experiencing heart palpitations. A young man is constantly being sick and needs to go to hospital. A bike ride ends with a bruised bottom the likes of which the paramedics have never seen before, and after seven weeks with an infection an asthma patient is still struggling to breathe

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Brooke is rushed to St George's after suffering an asthma attack so severe that the paramedic team had to put her in an induced coma at the scene. Doctors are concerned that she may have dangerous amounts of fluid on her lungs and decide to take urgent chest X-rays. Howard, who's 76, arrives with burns to his face, hands and airways after trying to put out an explosion in his garden shed. As his worried wife waits for news in the relatives' room, doctors attempt to stabilise his condition and investigate the extent of his injuries

Husband Paul sits nervously at her bedside as they wait to see if the drug she has been given will bring back her speech and movement. Meanwhile, doctors examine 66-year-old Steven, who has been admitted with severe stomach cramps

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Three groups of campers explore The Highlands of Scotland. Their first stop is Aberfeldy Caravan Park on the river Tay, where a ceilidh and some whitewater rafting are on the cards

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the Wirral, Simon O'Brien has a crazy plan to turn a chunky chain into a standard lamp, while Henry Cole restores a 1963 Ford Anglia

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is near Preston, where Simon O'Brien restores a spotlight he believes may be from a German U-boat while Henry Cole gets creative with an aircraft jump seat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire Hilton, who runs Robertsbrook Guest House in Swanage, Dorset, feels she has a good chance of winning the title of best B&B as another round of the competition gets under way. However, guests Lynn Self and Ziggy Broome have doubts over the cleanliness of their bedroom, and another couple are accustomed to more opulent surroundings

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lynn Self and Ziggy Broome hope to impress with their two-star B&B Eden Lodge in Falmouth, Cornwall. However, the state of their property disappoints their fellow competitors. At dinner, James and Maria Church reveal the truth about their famous daughter Charlotte, and the following morning's breakfast reduces some of the guests to fits of giggles

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the turn of Charlotte Church's parents James and Maria to play host at Dexby Townhouse in Cardiff, and they pull out all the stops by laying on a day of white-water rafting and a magic performance courtesy of their nephew Elliot. But the following morning, some of the guests are kept waiting for breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Newlyweds Pip Easby and Nicky Lesser-Easby, who run Muddifords Court Country House in Devon, open their doors for the final stay of the competition. The Churches find their four-poster bed too small, and not all the guests enjoy their trip to a local glass-blowing factory, but feedback at check-out time leaves the hosts feeling confident

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. An underpayment from a surprising source changes the dynamics of the group and throws the competition wide open, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former property developer Ian hosts the first dinner party in Gloucestershire, hoping his super-healthy menu will win him the £1,000 prize - although it is possible his guests may be more impressed with his 12-bedroom mansion in the country. Some naked antics, a pinata and stories of millions pounds won and lost make it a night to remember

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Then-Miss Cheltenham Sophie hosts the second dinner party in Gloucestershire, hoping her evening of elegant food and pageantry will win her the £1,000 prize. The 24-year-old reveals what she does for a living to her guests, and one attendee makes a surprising confession of her own

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby-loving Carmel hosts the third dinner party in Gloucestershire, and she hopes to impress with a 'Six Nations' starter, a pancetta, king prawn and chorizo main, and a Key lime pie for dessert. An attempt to charm her guests backfires when she likens Ian to a psychotic killer, and the atmosphere takes a further knock after Chris gets on the wrong side of Sophie

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: School teacher Polly, 40, hosts the fourth night of the competition in Gloucestershire, and hopes to impress her guests with a fine-dining experience. She begins with a seafood starter before serving up a meaty main course, and isn't unnerved by the fact she hasn't had any practise cooking either dish. However, her guests show off round the table and threaten to take the attention away from the night, but Ian is highly impressed with Polly's choice of entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the turn of exuberant hair salon owner Chris to host the final dinner party in Gloucestershire with home-made treats on the menu, including a tiger prawn starter, venison for the main and a dessert of chocolate and walnut ice-cream. Chat around the table reveals some differing opinions after the guests make a discovery in the host's living room, and the group reflect on their time together before the winner of the cash prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition begins in Norfolk at the Old Ram Coaching Inn, one of five-star-trained Victoria MacDonald's three B&B sites. Guests Michele and Cheryl aren't impressed with Victoria's dusty towel rail and a suspicious brown smudge in the toilet. However, Aaron and Mel aren't happy about a hairy bed. At breakfast, Aaron fumes over his eggs, and Alan and Alison's feedback leaves Victoria reaching for the tissues

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Ye Old Crown in Edenbridge, Kent, where chef and owner Aaron Webster aims to deliver a three star service for a two star price

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Beach Lodge Hotel in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, as hosts Cheryl and Michele aim to offer their guests a perfect seaside break

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Alison play host to the others at the Farmer's Arms in Taunton, where they hope their palatial rooms will help them win. But a dusty radiator might be their undoing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores, with Coaching Inn owner Victoria wanting to get to the bottom of Michele and Cheryl's comments about her toilet

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jay and Charlene, parents to one-year-old Kai, who bought and refurbished their two bed home in Romford, Essex but now want to upsize to Chelmsford. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer assists Jemma and Graham, who returned from Los Angeles three years ago and want to settle in Southend-on-Sea

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the music quiz, with five players battling it out for a place in Original PopMaster. Only one can remain victorious and play 3 in 10. Will they score high enough to guarantee a place in the Grand Final?

programme.title: Panda
programme.desc: The detective is panicking about Sacha's first visit, and is persuaded to investigate the murder of a dance teacher at a senior citizens' village. He joins the class on the dance floor in a bid to uncover the residents' secrets, and very quickly, the suspicion of a blackmailer emerges. In French

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Two families come to terms with life-changing events, including the relatives of eight-year-old Junior, who has an open leg fracture and suspected internal bleeding after being knocked off his bike by a car. His mum Bekki reveals how Junior learned to cope with extraordinary setbacks and how she worries about his future because of health problems of her own. Meanwhile, 46-year-old Anthony arrives in A&E after suffering chest pains during a day out at the races. As doctors attempt to get to the bottom of what's causing his dangerously high heart rate, his wife discusses how Anthony's awareness of his mortality was increased by losing his father

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a van and a car that have collided at a roundabout, involving a man who must always wear a crash helmet to protect himself from frequent seizures. A woman at a social club fears chest pains could be a sign of a heart attack. And a trip to the shops ends badly after a nasty fall

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man with a deep cut to the head refuses to go to hospital for fear that he won't come out again. It's not often the paramedics treat a patient who runs off, but that's what happens when they're called to a suspected drug overdose. A homeless man is in agony with spasms in his back, and a 12-year-old girl with epilepsy has a seizure, but her mother still wants her to go to school

The veterans recall dramatic stories of Passchendaele in 1917, the German army's Spring Offensive in 1918, and the British troop's final push to victory

programme.title: Heroes of the Somme
programme.desc: Military historian Dr Gavin Hughes traces the stories of seven of the men whose remarkable bravery won them the Victoria Cross, Britain's most prized military medal. Hughes travels to France to piece together their experiences, covering four key days of the battle and telling the story of the entire offensive, using a copy of a 100-year-old battle map to navigate the Somme landscape today and pinpoint the locations of individuals and the battalions they fought in

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: By the mid thirties, Adolf Hitler's ambitions seemed clear to all. If the great powers had acted earlier, would their intervention have prevented WW2?

programme.title: The World After Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver charts the brutal battles that marked the beginning of Roman Britain, discovering evidence of the empire's artillery and its first roads and forts. He examines the rebellion led by Queen Boudicca, which resulted in the deaths of thousands of Romans in St Albans, London and Colchester, and learns more about the creation of Hadrian's Wall

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: On the surface, police officer Albert Pacheco and his wife Cathy live a charmed life in Hawaii. But this seemingly perfect household is hiding something evil

programme.title: American Monster
programme.sub-title: If Only He Had a Heart
programme.desc: Tina Swor and partner John Dalton start a new life in Spirit Lake, Idaho. But John's erratic behaviour and love of guns plague their fresh start

programme.title: American Detective with Lt Joe Kenda
programme.desc: After the strangulation of a New Jersey mother on Valentine's Day, solving the case comes down to a pair of bangles, and a chance encounter at a deli.

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.desc: Robert Rinder examines a Redditch rape case from 1996, in which Victor Nealon spent 17 years trying to clear his name, and an 18-month nationwide crime spree carried out by a gang. The programme examines the combined efforts of several police forces that were able to track down the gang and declare them guilty

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: How the murder of a respected correctional administrator at her home by an escaped prison inmate set police on a frantic manhunt throughout Tennessee

programme.title: People Magazine Presents: Crimes of the 2000s
programme.desc: A spree killer who leaves his victims tied up with neckties torments the men of Atlanta in 2002. One clue left behind could be the final puzzle piece

programme.title: People Magazine Presents: Crimes of the 2000s

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: How, after enjoying the trip of a lifetime, a 66-year-old man failed to return home to his wife. Detectives needed to rely on CCTV to uncover the facts of his disappearance

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A young professional murdered in her Orlando apartment. Detectives turned to CCTV footage to solve the case and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.desc: Angus explores Boyzone star Shane Lynch's super-cars and a camper-van-turned-mini-bar. Then he checks out presenter Julia Bradbury's Victorian chair

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team of experts bring four treasured family heirlooms back to life. First up, Rose Werner and her sister Linda hope that Suzie Fletcher can turn her expertise to a decorative leather box that they hold dear to their hearts. Peter Coxon is next to arrive, hoping the teamwork of Steve Fletcher and Dominic Chinea can provide a speedy recovery to a favourite childhood toy, a tin speedboat. Later, the experts also turn their attention to an Italian dressing table chair and a tortoise pouffe

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Mark Hill take a tour of the Highlands. A rare piece of glass and a penny bank go under the gavel, and one of Scotland's strongest men helps the pair on their way

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Roo Irvine and Mark Hill continue their Scottish jaunt as a 1970s Triumph transports the duo to shops scattered throughout the Highlands. A Georgian silver brooch gives veteran Tripper Roo something solemn to think about, but a rather unorthodox key rack, she hopes, will unlock some big profits. Meanwhile, rookie Tripper Mark continues to buy like an old hand as he finds a wooden sculpture of a naked torso that makes for an exhilarating auction

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Angela Brennan believed she was adopted, but at 18 her mother revealed she had an older sister, also called Angela, who had been put up for adoption by her parents. Cameras follow Angela's search for her namesake sibling. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell also examine the story of Bronwen Hook. When her son, Mark, was born, she did her best to raise him, but Bronwen found being responsible for a baby hard, and gave him up for adoption. She's always hoped she would see Mark again. Will she finally get her chance?

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Julie Roberts, a chocolate factory-worker from Birmingham, has always known she was adopted. She longs to find her mother Marion, to see what impact her teenage pregnancy had and find out what became of her. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell also investigate the case of keen biker Marc Wolfe, who knows little about his birth mother, other than that she was Jewish and her one wish was for her son to be adopted into a Jewish family. After the death of his adoptive mother, his feelings intensified and he decided to look for his biological mum. Marc wants to know why she gave him up

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: An extraordinary double search within one family, beginning as sister Maureen looks for her brother Keith to tell him the truth about their father, followed by a further search with Keith to find out more about the birth mother he never knew. programme.desc: Davina McCall, Nicky Campbell and the team help 67-year-old Christine Rose to search for the sisters she was separated from at the age of four when her mother was prosecuted for neglect. programme.title: Swindlers
programme.desc: The story of Dublin solicitor Thomas Byrne, who stole ?52 million from the banks and took ownership of 12 of his victims' houses in one of the biggest cases of white-collar crime in the history of the Irish State. This documentary charts how the solicitor scammed his neighbours and clients by transferring a dozen properties into his own name and lending from multiple banks using the houses as collateral

programme.title: Daniel O'Connell: The Emancipator
programme.desc: The year 2025 marked the 250th anniversary of the birth of Daniel O'Connell, the Kerry barrister and MP who became one of Ireland's greatest figures by securing Catholic emancipation, pioneering non-violent mass political mobilisation, and inspiring democratic movements around the world. This documentary tells his story, with insights by leading historians and scholars, including former President Mary McAleese, Declan Kiberd, Jay Rosman, Patrick Geoghegan, Niamh Gallagher and Chanté Mouton-Kinyon. Narrated by Domhnall Gleeson

programme.title: Welcome To Moore Street
programme.desc: Cameras follow Polish gym owner Pawel as he and his daughter chase her MMA dreams, and street photographer Aarif as he documents rising tensions in the city centre. Architect Freidrich shares his vision for the redevelopment of Moore Street, while relatives of the 1916 leaders put forward their own plan

programme.title: Build Your Own Home
programme.desc: Builder Harrison Gardner helps obstetrician Joan Lennon and her German partner Andrea Kowarschik, who are currently living in a campervan beside Joan's home town of Belturbet, Co Cavan, while they renovate two adjoining stone cottages, adding a timber frame extension to the rear for office space

programme.title: Kerry: Tides of Time
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story of the county's landscape, from its earliest origins, deep in the geological past, right up to the present day, told by those who know it intimately. This edition starts with a look at an isolated stretch of rocky shoreline that reveals evidence of the very first vertebrate life on Earth, before exploring human culture in the county

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo has reached Lincolnshire, where his coastal railway journey from Middlesbrough ends. In Grimsby Town, he investigates a new stage in the town's history - as a maintenance base for some of the largest wind farms in the world. In neighbouring Cleethorpes, Michael rides on the Cleethorpes Coast Light Railway, pulled by a miniature steam locomotive. Later, Michael makes for a curious and wild stretch of coastline at Humberston

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7

As the lion pride continues to grow, becoming the largest in Africa, competition for food leads to chaos and infighting. Could this pride's success also be it downfall?

The film focuses on the relationship between Gallagher brothers Noel and Liam, including their infamous sibling rivalry, and also features rare concert footage. With Noel Gallagher, Liam Gallagher, Peggie Gallagher, Paul 'Bonehead' Arthurs, Paul 'Guigsy' McGuigan, Tony McCarroll, Alan McGee and Owen Morris

programme.title: Anam: Songs for Hearts & Minds
programme.sub-title: Ormond Castle, Carrick On Suir, Co Tipperary
programme.desc: Musical performances set against the backdrop of Ireland's historic landmarks, kicking off in Tipperary's Ormond Castle, with songs from country and blues sensation Muireann Bradley, musical polymath Uly and a solo set by Big Thief's Adrianne Lenker

programme.title: EuroNews
programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: The Seventies
programme.sub-title: The State of the Union Is Not Good
programme.desc: The documentary examines how America went from bad to worse as it dealt with one crisis after another throughout the presidential terms of Gerald Ford and Jimmy Carter

programme.title: Rolling Stone: Stories from the Edge
programme.desc: A look at the rise of Trump's America, Jann Wenner's 2016 post-election interview with Barack Obama, and the magazine's relationship with Bob Dylan

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a sale of the Queen frontman's personal effects at Sotheby's in London, telling his story through the items up for auction. Spanning art, fashion, musical instruments, personal papers and possessions, candid photographs, furniture, and jewels, accrued over the course of 50 years, the sales allowed the public to bid for a piece of rock 'n' roll history

programme.title: Painting Birds with Jim and Nancy Moir
programme.desc: The couple are joined by pianist and broadcaster Jools Holland and local artist David Hunt as they travel to Kent to paint the long-eared owl

programme.title: Mozart's Women: A Musical Journey
programme.desc: Lauren Laverne presents as the ENO Orchestra and opera soloists go on musical journey through the life of Mozart, putting the spotlight on the relationships with his real-life leading ladies. With arias from Così fan tutte, The Magic Flute amd Don Giovanni

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a farm scene featuring a big red barn with a rickety wooden fence, capturing vivid childhood memories

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross depicts a scene using only his special painting knife, featuring powerful clouds, rolling hills and winding river waters

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross depicts marshland scene, with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A housewife befriends a stray cat and suddenly finds her life begins to change. Drama, starring Joseph Cotten and Wendy Hiller

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An American tourist on board a trans-Atlantic liner stakes everything on the biggest gamble of his life. Jack Weston and Gladys Spencer star

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A jewellery firm casts out the last of a family who've been employees for 117 years, and the company won't hire the last of the line because she's a woman. Faithful service goes unrewarded when her father is given a week to finish up, but he resolves to show how much he'll be missed by selling the firm's most expensive gem by his last day of 37 years' service. Drama, starring Claude Rains and Betsy von Furstenberg

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Jobless John Manbridge indulges in many diversions in life, including betting on horses. When cousin Felix discovers that John is forging checks from his account, he warns John that he will prosecute if he does not stop stealing his money. With Denholm Elliott and Torin Thatcher

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actor, whose films include Beetlejuice, Batman, Pacific Heights, Spotlight and Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.desc: A look at author Ian Fleming's remarkable life, his creation James Bond's effect on literature and film and the spy's influence on actual intelligence.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman who worries about being late is taunted by her husband - especially when a trip to America seems doomed after a series of delays. Julie Harris and Roland Culver star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An art collector battles with two beautiful women in a story laced with greed and deceit. Drama, starring Joseph Cotten, Gloria Grahame and Maureen O'Brien

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A small-town sheriff investigates the disappearance of the wife of a man who has been acting suspiciously, according to his nosy neighbours

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.sub-title: John Lennon - John Lennon/Plastic Ono Band
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the making of John Lennon's first solo album John Lennon/Plastic Ono Band, which includes Mother, Love and Working Class Hero. The programme uncovers how themes of isolation, anger, religion and class were drawn from his own experiences, with most tracks written while he was undergoing therapy with Dr Arthur Janov in California. Featuring contributions by Yoko Ono, Ringo Starr, Klaus Voorman and Jan Wenner

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor, whose films include Empire of the Sun, Dangerous Liaisons and Con Air, and who was Oscar-nominated for Places in the Heart and In the Line of Fire

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A trickster gets her comeuppance after playing an evil joke at the expense of a caring couple. Drama, starring Elaine Strich and Shane Rimmer

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man discovers a vintage wine and impulsively gambles that no one will be able to name it. Drama, starring Ron Moody and Anthony Carrick

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: After a man puts a permanent end to his dominant wife's demands for extravagance, he becomes the victim of blackmail. With Ralph Meeker, Ida Moore and Russell Collins

programme.desc: Ian Nathan examines David Lynch's 2001 neo-noir mystery, which follows an aspiring actress newly arrived in Los Angeles and stars Naomi Watts, Laura Harring and Justin Theroux

programme.title: Mulholland Drive (2001)
programme.desc: An actress arrives home to find a mysterious woman in her room who is suffering from amnesia. David Lynch's mystery, starring Naomi Watts, Justin Theroux, Laura Harring and Robert Forster

programme.title: The Unstoppable Shirley MacLaine
programme.desc: A profile of the Oscar-winning American actress and author, celebrating a fearless career of reinvention, longevity and memorable performances

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Miles Crawford, a movie star-turned-lawyer, hires the best criminal lawyer he can find when his son is accused of murder - but then changes his mind and convinces his son that he should represent him. Starring Richard Basehart and Russell Collins

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the success of Duran Duran's album Rio, which propelled the band into the limelight during the 1980s with its optimistic feel against a backdrop of mass unemployment and the Falklands War. Featuring interviews with original members of the band including Simon Le Bon and Nick Rhodes, as well as contributions by Bob Geldof and Anthony Price

programme.title: Discovering Film

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man is haunted by an unhappy childhood and taunted by school bullies - and a stranger on a train could be responsible for his misery. Drama, starring John Mills and Anthony Steel

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Rev George Duckworth has problems attracting female attention, but things change when a beautiful woman joins his congregation. Drama, starring Joan Collins and John Alderton

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Scotland Yard believes recently widowed Lady Gwendolyn Avon plans to sell valuable emeralds outside the country even though the treasury has a claim on them. When the surveilled jewels disappear, it seems she's prevailed. With Roger Moore and Hazel Court

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An elderly woman reveals she has included a kind waitress in her will and life. Thereafter life is never the same as the potential beneficiary sets about realising her fortune sooner rather than later. With Rick Jason and Olive Deering

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold

In King's Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegon's fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma D'Arcy

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: When a police officer is found shot dead, Elizabeth Wu writes an article praising his dedication to the job, only for an informer to call her with a contradiction - the cop was targeted when he demanded his money back in a dope deal. Meanwhile, Kellerman's rogue brothers show up and he winds up in a jail cell with them

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Two bombings near Valentine's Day result in two deaths with no apparent connections. Brodie finds a way to get a confession from a drug dealer who conned a victim into playing Russian roulette with a fully loaded gun. The Pembletons' marriage seems to be disintegrating in spite of therapy, while Lewis and Cox wait outside an office where a third bomb has been delivered.

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. Richard speaks to Steel Magnolias author Robert Harling about the Soniat House, check into the supposedly haunted Hotel Maison de Ville and talks to burlesque dancer Chrissy Owens at the Roosevelt

programme.desc: Lulu faces the college board and must make a decision about her future, and Martin discovers Hilton's plans for the research and tries to warn Les before their life's work is lost

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the city's biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Prince's plan is put in jeopardy when Chuck unleashes a new kind of attack. Meanwhile, a discovery sets off chaos at Michael Prince Capital

programme.title: We Own This City

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Separated and under pressure, Amber turns to Tibor for help as a wider threat begins to emerge. Action thriller, starring Tahar Rahim and Izuka Hoyle

programme.sub-title: Gone into the Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: Lulu faces the college board and must make a decision about her future, and Martin discovers Hilton's plans for the research and tries to warn Les before their life's work is lost

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clark's trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: On election night, Tom tries to manage an increasingly chaotic newsroom, while the Roy siblings spar over the outcome. Starring Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Munch's high school love interest, Helen Rosenthal, is raped and murdered, leaving Munch and Kellerman trying to solve the case

programme.title: Hacks

On the heels of accomplishing everything she's ever wanted, Deborah reveals her final chapter. Final episode of the comedy drama, starring Jean Smart and Hannah Einbinder

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Chris Thormann must confront the fact that the assailant who shot and blinded him is up for parole - and he might get it

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the world's oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capital's love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the city's first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the city's biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Chris Thormann must confront the fact that the assailant who shot and blinded him is up for parole - and he might get it

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: One of Luther's drug-mules is found dead of an overdose. Richard Belzer stars

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the series, another attempt is made on Alma's life, prompting her to seek refuge at the Gem. Meanwhile, Trixie decides to take matters into her own hands, leaving the rest of the camp to deal with what she's done, and Langrishe falls out with Hearst. Drama set in a lawless US town, starring Molly Parker, Brian Cox and Paula Malcomson

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Town sheriff Seth Bullock awaits the results of election day with frayed nerves. Meanwhile, the villainous prospector George Hearst remains in Deadwood, looking to attend to some unfinished business

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Prince's political ambitions come with a surprising twist, and his intentions are met with scepticism, while Wendy, Wags and Taylor turn to an old friend for guidance. Chuck aligns with an unlikely ally in hopes of leveraging his freedom. Drama, starring Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis

programme.desc: Prince recruits campaign support and encourages the Cappers to aim high under a new directive for big swings, while Chuck negotiates with a face from his past to advance a new agenda. Axe shares a glimpse into his new life.

programme.title: We Own This City

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma D'Arcy

programme.title: Ponies
programme.desc: As the widows begin their training, Bea becomes the handler for Soviet technician Sasha and catches the eye of dangerous KGB officer Andrei. Meanwhile, Twila's assignment entertaining a businessman uncovers a much deeper conspiracy

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: As Ava embarks on her next project, Deborah, Marcus and Marty officially open The Diva, and Jimmy's new role proves fortuitous. On the heels of accomplishing everything she's ever wanted, Deborah reveals her final chapter. Final episode of the comedy drama, starring Jean Smart and Hannah Einbinder

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Shane confirms Rose's suspicions and admits he is gay, but they agree to remain friends. At the 2017 all-star game, Ilya and Shane reconnect and they play on the same team for the first time

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Amid rising tensions, Shiv tries to reposition herself within a new political landscape, while Kendall rallies supporters. Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemon's unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon puts pressure on Oscar Tully to raise up his bannermen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma D'Arcy

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their son's birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island (2017)
programme.desc: Years after two enemy pilots land on a mysterious unchartered island in the Pacific, a team of scientists embark on a top-secret mission to the same region. Things soon descend into chaos when the local wildlife proves far from welcoming, and they must battle to escape from the domain of the mighty Kong. Action adventure, starring Tom Hiddleston, Samuel L Jackson and Brie Larson

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers' home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Green Lantern (2011)
programme.desc: A cocky test pilot is given a mysterious ring by a dying alien and transported to another world, where he learns he has been recruited into a galactic peacekeeping organisation. He trains to use the incredible powers the ring grants him, and returns to Earth to defend it from a powerful force that feeds on fear. Sci-fi adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds, Blake Lively, Peter Sarsgaard and Mark Strong

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island (2017)
programme.desc: Years after two enemy pilots land on a mysterious unchartered island in the Pacific, a team of scientists embark on a top-secret mission to the same region. Things soon descend into chaos when the local wildlife proves far from welcoming, and they must battle to escape from the domain of the mighty Kong. Action adventure, starring Tom Hiddleston, Samuel L Jackson and Brie Larson

programme.title: Jurassic World (2015)
programme.desc: Decades on from the creation of Jurassic Park, a fully operational attraction filled with genetically engineered dinosaurs has been opened on the island. In need of a new attraction, the company behind the park creates an entirely new species - only for it to escape and terrorise the tourists. Action adventure sequel, starring Chris Pratt and Bryce Dallas Howard

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom (2018)
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of Jurassic World, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing are asked to return to the theme park to save its resident dinosaurs from the island's active volcano. During their mission, they uncover a conspiracy that may affect the entire planet. Action sequel, starring Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, Rafe Spall and Toby Jones

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sally's relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday she's given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: The Meg (2018)
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving the crew of the disabled vessel trapped at the bottom of the Pacific. Rescue diver Jonas Taylor is hired to save the crew from a 75ft-long prehistoric shark, known as the Megalodon. Director Jon Turteltaub's action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Bingbing Li, Rainn Wilson and Ruby Rose

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess who grows up in enchanted realm has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War. American airman Steve Trevor crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in an attempt to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Director Patty Jenkins' blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Green Lantern (2011)
programme.desc: A cocky test pilot is given a mysterious ring by a dying alien and transported to another world, where he learns he has been recruited into a galactic peacekeeping organisation. He trains to use the incredible powers the ring grants him, and returns to Earth to defend it from a powerful force that feeds on fear. Sci-fi adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds, Blake Lively, Peter Sarsgaard and Mark Strong

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: Clash of the Titans (2010)
programme.desc: The son of the Greek god Zeus is raised by humans and grows up to reject his immortal heritage in anger at the gods' cruel treatment of humans. He sets out on a quest to find a means to kill the evil lord of the underworld in revenge for his father's death, facing all manner of strange creatures. Mythological adventure, with Sam Worthington, Liam Neeson, Ralph Fiennes and Gemma Arterton

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

Director Patty Jenkins' blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man (2012)
programme.desc: A gifted teenager investigates the secrets hidden in his dead parents' past, leading him to a mysterious corporation and an incident that imbues him with superhuman powers. A personal tragedy drives him to use his new-found abilities to fight crime, and he is soon drawn into a deadly battle against a former colleague of his father, who has undergone a devastating transformation of his own. Superhero adventure reboot, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone and Rhys Ifans

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014)
programme.desc: The webslinging hero battles a powerful new enemy when a downtrodden engineer develops lethal electrical powers, which he unleashes on those he believes have betrayed him. As if that wasn't enough to keep him busy, he faces an even greater threat when he is reunited with an unstable old friend who has been charged with a sinister mission by his dying father, leading to a series of tense confrontations that threaten to change his life for ever. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx and Dane DeHaan

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: The Cinema List: Race Against Time
programme.desc: This edition is about the race against time, from a deadly threat in Fuze to The Desperate Hour, where Naomi Watts faces every parent's nightmare - the clock is ticking

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale (2025)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal. Romantic drama, starring Joely Richardson, Joanne Froggatt and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: One Last Deal (2026)
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent scrambles to land one last high-stakes deal for his star client, with both their futures on the line. Drama, starring Danny Dyer and Elliott Rogers

programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: Don't Let's Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her family's Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: Former detective Colin Sutton revisits the investigation into the murder of Thomas Cressman

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of William Bonin, the savage serial killer who took the lives of more than 21 teenage boys and left their bodies strewn across freeways in California

programme.title: Ireland's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: In 2005, Farah Swaleh Noor's body parts were found in a Dublin canal. Soon, his partner and her daughters came under the microscope

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.desc: Presenter Fred Dinenage reflects on the story of Ruth Ellis, who was found guilty of the murder of her estranged lover. She was hanged for the offence in 1955, the last woman to suffer such a fate in the United Kingdom

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of John Cannan, a dangerous sexual predator who murdered one young woman just days after his release from prison, and is suspected of many others

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Billy the new sniffer spaniel finds live ammunition during a search for drugs, and a stabbing on the streets of London brings together two of the city's leading Alsatian dog teams. programme.title: The Kid Stays in the Picture (2002)
programme.desc: Film producer Robert Evans narrates this documentary chronicling the ups and downs of his extraordinary life. Among the topics covered are his big break into the movie industry, his failed marriage to Ali McGraw, his relationships with Grace Kelly and Ava Gardner, his descent into drug addiction, and his journey back to respectability. With contributions by friends and family, and including footage of a host of Hollywood legends

programme.title: Val (2021)
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the daily life of actor Val Kilmer, featuring never-before-seen footage spanning 40 years

programme.title: Jackie Stewart
